name: stop_instance
description: Stops a Google Compute Engine virtual machine (VM) instance. Requires project, zone, and instance name as input. Proceed only if there is no error in response and the status of the operation is `DONE` without any errors. To get details of the operation, use the `get_zone_operation` tool.

parameters.description: Request message for stopping an instance.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instance.
